---
title: "Stretch Challenge - Eliot"
subtitle: "Unit 1 Task 4"
author: "Ethan Neunhoffer"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
    title-block-banner: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: body
    number-sections: false
    html-math-method: katex
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-copy: hover
    code-tools:
        source: false
        toggle: true
        caption: See code
execute: 
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import polars as pl
import numpy as np
from lets_plot import *

LetsPlot.setup_html(isolated_frame=False)
```



```{python}
df = pl.read_csv("https://posit.byui.edu/content/0d43d66f-d3b7-4c43-8c36-52e3ed69e7f1/names_year_csv.csv")
```


```{python}
elliot = df.filter(
    (pl.col('name') == 'Elliot') & (pl.col('year') > 1949)
).sort("year")
print(elliot)

(ggplot(elliot, aes(x='year', y='Total', color='name'))
    + geom_line()
    + scale_color_manual(values={'Elliot': 'blue'})
    + geom_vline(xintercept=1982, color='red', linetype='dashed')
    + geom_vline(xintercept=1985, color='red', linetype='dashed')
    + geom_vline(xintercept=2002, color='red', linetype='dashed')
    + scale_x_continuous(format='d', breaks=list(range(1950, 2030, 10)))
    + scale_y_continuous(format='d', breaks=list(range(0, 3500, 500)))
    + xlab('year')
    + ylab('')
    + theme(panel_grid=element_blank(), legend_position='right')
    + labs(title='Elliot...What?' )
    + geom_text(x=1974, y=3000, label='E.T. Released', color='black')
    + geom_text(x=1993, y=3000, label='Second Release', color='black')
    + geom_text(x=2009, y=3000, label='Third Release', color='black')
    + ggsize(800, 500)


)
```
